description: Simple linear regression — video length predicting watch time, computation tool connected

input.data_description: 30 long-form videos with length and average view duration

expected.coefficients: object with intercept and video_length_min keys, both numeric
expected.p_values: object with intercept and video_length_min keys
expected.residual_summary: object with mean, std, min, max keys
expected.interpretation: non-empty string relating video length to watch time

prohibit: coefficients with null values when tool is connected
fabricated R-squared not from a computation tool

description: Logistic regression — predicting whether a video crosses 10K views, returns odds ratios

input.data_description: 50 videos with binary outcome (crossed 10K views or not) and three predictors

expected.coefficients: object with intercept and three predictor keys
expected.odds_ratios: object with same keys as coefficients
expected.interpretation: non-empty string interpreting odds ratios in creator context

prohibit: r_squared field present instead of pseudo_r_squared for logistic model
fabricated odds ratios not from computation
coefficients with null values when tool connected

description: No computation tool connected — guidance-only output with runnable Python code

expected.runnable_code: non-null string containing statsmodels or sklearn import
expected.retrieval_gaps: contains note about no computation engine connected

prohibit: coefficients or r_squared with numeric values when no tool connected
computation_source other than guidance_only when no tool available

description: Polynomial degree requested as 8 — capped at 5 with overfitting warning
prohibit: no warning about overfitting when degree was reduced
silent degree reduction without noting in output
